description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of light and dark exterior colors. The structure includes multiple large windows arranged in horizontal rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. There are two garage doors on the front facade, as well as a main entry door and several smaller windows. The property includes an outdoor swimming pool and a covered patio or pergola area, both detached from the main building. The house appears to be a single-story residence with a spacious, open layout and distinct zones for living, garage, and outdoor recreation. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large horizontal windows, two garages, and an outdoor pool with a covered patio area. The design is clean and geometric, emphasizing open space and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two garage doors, the main entry door, and several windows on a dark facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink-walled section, the flat roof, and the detached pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, the open backyard, and a clear view of the pool and covered patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three large windows, the pool and patio further from the house, and a clear look at the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flanked by windows and adjacent to two garage doors, minimal decorative elements
